definition.value: Hurt that involves emasculation, permanent privation of sight or hearing, privation of any member or joint, permanent disfiguration, fracture or dislocation, or any hurt which endangers life or causes severe bodily pain for 20 days
With intention or knowledge that the act is likely to cause grievous hurt

description.value: Voluntarily causing grievous hurt to any person
Grievous hurt as defined is actually caused
A strikes B on the eye with an iron rod, permanently destroying B's sight in that eye. A has voluntarily caused grievous hurt.
A throws acid at B, permanently disfiguring B's face. A has voluntarily caused grievous hurt.
